test.observation: 1 passed, 70 skipped (database tests skipped due to missing DB_URL)

lint.observation: 9 warnings about 'any' types in test utilities (acceptable)

blockingIssues.description: Missing test for VAL-TEST-018: POST /claims Requires Authentication. The test suite includes authentication tests for GET /mine but not for POST /. Unauthenticated POST /claims should return 401 Unauthorized.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add a test case: 'should require authentication (401 without session)' in the POST / describe block that creates an app without authentication middleware and makes a POST /claims request, expecting 401 status.

blockingIssues.description: The test 'should limit results to 20 most recent claims' is incorrectly implemented. It creates 25 claims by DIFFERENT students, then tests that the host user (who has 0 claims) gets an empty array. This does NOT test the 20-claim limit for a single user.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Rewrite the test to create 25+ listings, have one student claim all of them, then verify only 20 are returned. Or accept that this limit cannot be meaningfully tested due to the UNIQUE(listing_id, student_id) constraint and update the assertion as a design limitation.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-TEST-078 is NOT tested: 'Server-side rendering (no window) returns null from getItem, setItem/deleteItem are no-ops.' The source code correctly handles this case, but no test verifies it.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add a test that either: (a) uses Jest's @jest-environment node docblock to run without jsdom, or (b) temporarily deletes/mocks the global window object to test SSR behavior.

nonBlockingIssues.description: identity-obj-proxy is referenced in jest.config.js but not installed. Consider installing or removing the reference.
VAL-TEST-003's custom render wrapper requirement is not implemented. Should be added when actual component tests are written.
Duplicate boundary value tests (1, 100, 0, 101 appear twice each). Could be consolidated.
Single-claim tests cannot verify claimed_at DESC ordering. Should create multiple claims with different timestamps.

appliedUpdates.description: Added testing conventions documentation: DB_URL/DB_SKIP environment variables, conditional test pattern, secureStoreMock pattern, Date-to-string transform, PostgreSQL interval construction

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing environment documentation: DB_URL for test database connection, DB_SKIP to skip database-dependent tests, and the itIf(isDbAvailable, ...) pattern for conditional test execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple test files use the conditional test pattern. Workers need to know how to run tests without a database.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when to use preset: 'jest-expo' vs preset: undefined. Current skill says 'use jest-expo preset' but workers have found success with manual configuration.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: jest-rtl-setup worker used preset: undefined with manual mocks instead of jest-expo preset.

rejectedObservations.reason: docker-compose.yml was added for local testing but services.yaml describes operational services. Docker Compose for local test database doesn't fit the services model of 'start/stop/healthcheck'.
